User.title: User
User.description: User profile information representing an authenticated user.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile photo.

provider.description: The authentication provider (e.g., google, apple, naver, kakao).

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: When the user profile was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Information about a completed product order.

SiteData.title: SiteData
SiteData.description: Global configuration and content for the entire store.

/config/site_data.description: Global configuration and content. Note: Products are now in their own collection.

/products/{productId}.description: Individual product entries to avoid document size limits.

/curation_details/{curationId}.description: Detailed content for curations to avoid document size limits.

/users/{userId}.description: User document stored by their UID.

/users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}.description: Orders associated with a specific user.

/users/{userId}/wishlist/{wishId}.description: Products saved by the user in their wishlist.
